title: Onboarding - Login
scenario: First-time app launch shows license agreement, login options (Microsoft/Apple/Google/username-password), and navigates to Home Screen on successful login
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Observe the License Agreement screen. Tap 'Accept' to proceed.
3. On the login screen, observe the available options: 'Log in' or 'Sign up'.

4. Tap 'Log in' and choose one of the following methods:
   - Microsoft
   - Apple
   - Google
   - Username/Password
5. Complete the authentication flow for the selected method.
6. After successful authentication, observe the app navigation.
expected: User is navigated to the Home Screen of the Poly Studio Mobile app.
